title.description: Heading rendered above the steps as an Antd Typography.Title level 5.

progressDot.description: Render progress dots instead of icons on each step.

items.description: Action groups to render as steps. Each group is one step; its actions render in the step description.

action_group.description: Key into actionGroupConfig. Determines title, icon, and ordering.

actions.description: Actions within the group. The group's rolled-up status is derived from action.status values.

status.description: Per-action status. Drives the badge color and the group's rolled-up status.

message.description: Label rendered next to the badge. Sanitized HTML is supported. Struck through when status is 'not-required'.

link.description: Optional link wrapping the action message. Omit or set disabled to render plain text.

actionGroupConfig.description: Map of action_group key → display config. Required for items to render. Each entry: { order, title, icon, link? }. `order` controls step sequence, `title` is the step title (HTML allowed, struck through when group resolves to 'not-required'), `icon` is the Antd icon name shown on the step (overridden to AiOutlineCheckCircle when the group is 'done'), `link` (optional) wraps the title in a clickable Link.

link.description: Optional link wrapping the group title. Omit or set disabled to render plain text.

linkStyle.description: Style object merged into each action's Link via makeCssClass. Use `classNames.link` / `styles.link` for the same purpose if you prefer the standard Lowdefy theming surface.

theme.description: Antd `Steps` component theme overrides. Forwarded to ConfigProvider as `theme.components.Steps` for the duration of this block. See https://ant.design/components/steps#design-token for available tokens.
